title: YugabyteDB Cluster
description: Represents a YugabyteDB database cluster or universe, covering both Aeon (managed cloud) and Anywhere (self-managed) deployment models. Captures identity, cloud placement, compute configuration, connectivity endpoints, backup settings, and operational state.

id.description: Unique identifier for the cluster or universe.

name.description: Human-readable display name of the cluster.

deployment_model.description: Indicates whether this cluster is managed by YugabyteDB Aeon (cloud-managed) or YugabyteDB Anywhere (self-managed).

state.description: Current operational state of the cluster.

yugabytedb_version.description: YugabyteDB software version running on the cluster (e.g., 2.20.1.0-b1).

endpoints.description: Connection endpoints for accessing the cluster's YSQL and YCQL APIs.

allow_list_ids.description: List of IP allow list IDs assigned to this cluster to control inbound connections.

items.description: UUID of an IP allow list.

read_replicas.description: Read replica configurations attached to this cluster for geographically distributed read traffic.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the cluster was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the cluster configuration was last updated.

CloudInfo.description: Cloud provider and region placement for a cluster.

code.description: Cloud provider code indicating where the cluster is hosted.

region.description: Cloud provider region identifier where the cluster is deployed (e.g., us-east-1 for AWS, us-central1 for GCP, eastus for Azure).

multi_region.description: Whether this cluster spans multiple cloud regions.

regions.description: List of cloud regions when this is a multi-region cluster.

ClusterInfo.description: Compute, storage, and replication configuration for the cluster.

num_nodes.description: Total number of nodes in the cluster. Must be a multiple of the replication factor.

replication_factor.description: Number of data replicas across nodes. Determines fault tolerance.

fault_tolerance.description: Level at which the cluster can tolerate failures without losing availability.

cluster_tier.description: Service tier for Aeon clusters controlling available node sizes and features.

enable_ysql.description: Whether the PostgreSQL-compatible YSQL API is enabled on this cluster.

enable_ycql.description: Whether the Cassandra-compatible YCQL API is enabled on this cluster.

NodeInfo.description: Per-node compute and storage resource allocation.

num_cores.description: Number of vCPU cores per node.

memory_mb.description: Amount of memory in megabytes per node.

disk_size_gb.description: Storage disk size in gigabytes per node.

disk_iops.description: Provisioned IOPS for disk storage per node, where applicable.

instance_type.description: Cloud provider instance type for each node (e.g., m5.large for AWS).

ClusterEndpoint.description: A network endpoint for connecting to the cluster.

accessibility_type.description: Whether this endpoint is publicly reachable or only accessible via private networking.

port.description: Port number for the connection endpoint. YSQL defaults to 5433, YCQL to 9042.

api_type.description: Which database API this endpoint serves.

region.description: Cloud region this endpoint is associated with.

BackupConfig.description: Backup schedule and retention policy for the cluster.

schedule_enabled.description: Whether automatic scheduled backups are enabled for this cluster.

frequency_in_hours.description: How often scheduled backups are taken, in hours. Default is 24.

retention_period_in_days.description: Number of days scheduled backups are retained before automatic deletion. Default is 8.

storage_location.description: Cloud storage path or bucket where backups are stored.

MaintenanceWindow.description: Scheduled window during which Yugabyte may apply patches and infrastructure updates.

day_of_week.description: Day of the week when the maintenance window is scheduled.

start_time.description: UTC start time for the maintenance window in HH:MM format (24-hour clock).

duration_in_hours.description: Duration of the maintenance window in hours.

ReadReplica.description: An asynchronous read replica attached to a primary cluster for distributing read traffic.

id.description: Unique identifier for the read replica.

state.description: Current operational state of the read replica.

endpoints.description: Connection endpoints for the read replica.

EncryptionInTransit.description: TLS encryption settings for cluster communications.

node_to_node.description: Whether TLS encryption is enabled for node-to-node communication within the cluster.

client_to_node.description: Whether TLS encryption is enabled for client-to-node communication.

cert_expiry_time.description: Expiry timestamp for the TLS certificate in use on the cluster.
